## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / tooling
- [ ] Medical data change (drug entry, interaction, severity)

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` passes
- [ ] Relevant tests added or updated
- [ ] If this touches drug or interaction data: `tests/golden_cases.json` updated and a source is cited in the PR description
